codeReview.summary: Clean extraction of SVG and PNG decoders from drawing library. SVG moved to compositor as local module (mod svg), PNG moved to test crate (png_decoder.rs) since no service currently consumes it. Dead code (rasterizer.rs, truetype.rs) also removed. Drawing now has zero extern crate dependencies and contains only pixel primitives (Surface, Color, PixelFormat, fill/draw/blit/blend, gradients, gamma tables, palette, Xorshift32). All include!() directives cleaned — only gamma_tables.rs and palette.rs remain. build.rs correctly updated: drawing compiled with empty extern list, rerun-if-changed directives reference only existing files. Test coverage preserved via dedicated svg.rs and png.rs test files. SVG tests use include!() from compositor source, ensuring test code matches production code exactly. No stale drawing::Svg* or drawing::Png* references remain anywhere in the codebase.

issues.description: Stale documentation: drawing's Status line still references 'truetype.rs + rasterizer.rs + font_data.rs' which no longer exist. These files were removed as dead code in this commit. The line count and file list are now inaccurate. Not a behavioral issue but a documentation gap that could confuse future agents or sessions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: PNG decoder was placed in the test crate rather than a consumer service. The feature description says 'moved to their consumers (compositor, core)' but PNG was not actually used by any service — only by tests. The worker correctly identified this and placed it in test/tests/png_decoder.rs with documentation noting it can be moved to a service when needed. This is a reasonable deviation from the description wording, but the feature description should have been more precise about PNG's actual consumer.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: test/tests/png.rs header comment: 'The PNG decoder is a standalone format decoder. The code lives here in the test crate since no service currently consumes it. When a service needs PNG decoding, the code can be moved to that service's local modules.'

sharedStateObservations.observation: system/DESIGN.md line 108 is now stale after this refactoring mission — it still describes drawing as containing truetype.rs, rasterizer.rs, font_data.rs. This documentation should be updated to reflect drawing's actual post-mission contents (lib.rs, gamma_tables.rs, palette.rs only). This is a cross-feature concern since multiple features in this milestone modified drawing's contents.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: system/DESIGN.md:108 — 'Status: ~1600 lines (lib.rs + truetype.rs + rasterizer.rs + font_data.rs), 83 tests' vs actual drawing/ directory containing only lib.rs, gamma_tables.rs, palette.rs, Cargo.toml

summary: PASS. SVG and PNG decoders fully extracted from drawing library. All 4 deleted files (svg.rs, png.rs, rasterizer.rs, truetype.rs) confirmed absent. SVG correctly moved to compositor as local module. PNG placed in test crate (reasonable — no service consumer exists). build.rs properly updated with zero stale references. Drawing reduced to pure pixel primitives with zero extern crate dependencies. 12 files changed, 1080 insertions, 1295 deletions. All 1462 tests pass. One non-blocking documentation issue (stale DESIGN.md line).
